message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "user" as user
participant "Gstreamer Pipeline" as pipeline
participant "realsensesrc" as realsensesrc
participant "librealsense2" as librealsense2
participant "GStreamer" as gst

note right of user
load Gst pipeline with realsensesrc
end note

activate pipeline
realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : realsensesrc serial=728...
realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : rs2::context.query_devices()
librealsense2 --> realsensesrc : rs2::device_list
realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : select device by serial
librealsense2 --> realsensesrc : rs2::sensor
note right of librealsense2
Select device
end note

loop [for (info: rs2::rs2_camera_info)]
  realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : rs2::device.supports(info)
  librealsense2 --> realsensesrc : bool
  realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : rs2::device.get_info(info)
  librealsense2 --> realsensesrc : const char* info_string
  realsensesrc --> realsensesrc : store info
  realsensesrc -> gst : gst_tag_setter_add_tag_valist_values(..., infos, NULL)
  note right of gst
    Register per-stream metadata as Gst tags
  end note
end

realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : rs2::sensor.get_stream_profiles()
librealsense2 --> realsensesrc : std::vector<rs2::stream_profile>
loop [for (profile: std::vector<rs2::stream_profile>)]
  realsensesrc --> realsensesrc : Create profile_list of supported profiles
end
realsensesrc -> gst : g_object_class_install_properties(......, options)
note right of gst
Install all supported video profiles as an option
end

loop [for (option: rs2::rs2_option)]
  realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : rs2::sensor.supports(option)
  librealsense2 --> realsensesrc : bool
  realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : rs2::sensor.get_option_range
  librealsense2 --> realsensesrc : rs2::option_range
  realsensesrc --> realsensesrc : store option
  realsensesrc -> gst : g_object_class_install_properties(......, options)
  note right of gst
    Install all supported RS camera options as properties/options
  end note
end

realsensesrc -> gst : gst_bus_add_watch(bus, bus_call...);
note right of gst
Register callback for parameter changes
end note

realsensesrc -> pipeline : caps negotiation (CAPS)
note right of pipeline
- pixel_format
- width
- height
- framerate
end note

activate pipeline
pipeline -> pipeline : pipeline goto GST_STATE_PLAYING
pipeline -> realsensesrc : state=playing
realsensesrc -> librealsense2 : rs2::sensor.start()
librealsense2 --> librealsense2 : [active]
librealsense2 --> librealsense2 : [active]
librealsense2 --> librealsense2 : [active]
librealsense2 --> librealsense2 : [active]
librealsense2 --> librealsense2 : [active]
librealsense2 --> librealsense2 : [active]
librealsense2 --> librealsense2 : [active]
